data.name: The Lord of Time
data.detailed_description:
You play as a member of the renowned Zenti faction, a space and time travelling cult so powerful that the mention of their names turns armies around.
You wake up in your ship unsure of who you are or where you are.
You quickly find yourself on a strange planet known as Earth and must follow the orders of the Zenti.

This game is an adult visual novel with sandbox elements.

CONTENT AND MECHANICS:


  • Travel through locations in Time and Space
  • Meet and interact with interesting characters and find adult encounters,
  • Exciting music and sounds
  • Level up your character's skills
  • 8K high quality renders

Travel to modern day and be introduced to your companion, Liu Cheng.


Liu Cheng, a fiesty young mixed race girl living in China. You are both drawn together for some strange unknown reason.

Travel to ancient Egypt and build a strong alliance with the Pharaoh.


Egyptians are strong people. Travel to the ancient times and befriend the Pharaoh to gain strong allies.


Are you ready to become the Lord of Time?

data.short_description: You find yourself on a strange planet known as Earth and must follow the orders of the Zenti.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 5 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • Memory: 5 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Integrated graphics
  • Storage: 10 GB available space
